Detected WooCommerce markers, but the store API route is unavailable and lightweight inspection did not surface a safe paginated surfboard category path for the current regional adapter.

Follow-up target. The board room is reachable, but the current Shopify paths surface broad non-board merchandise and did not produce safe accepted surfboard rows through the existing Gen 3 adapter. Kept disabled until a reviewed board-room extraction path exists.

Promoted after validating the existing US Shopify path against the store-wide products feed. The feed produced clean surfboard rows with dimensions and low noise.

Promoted after validating the explicit surfboards collection through the US Shopify normaliser. The collection yielded surfboard rows with recoverable identifiers and acceptable noise.
Promoted after validating the new-surfboards Shopify collection. The collection produced clean surfboard rows with dimensions.

Promoted after validating the public board-inventory and board-sale pages. Product detail pages expose JSON-LD brand, price, availability, and dimension data for a high-value supported-brand US custom path.
